mapper.sql:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.OWNAME , A.OWKEY , A.ICNAME , A.ICKEY ,A.IVATKEY , SUM(A.TTQTY) WMS_TTQTY , SUM(A.AVQTY) WMS_AVQTY ,SUM(E.RESQTY) WMS_RES_QTY , SUM(ST_QTY) NWILL_QTY , A.IBCONFIRMDATE , A.BL_NO , A.LOT_NO, A.EXPIREDATE, A.PRODUCTDATE, A.UOM, A.SPEC , CASE WHEN SUM(A.TTQTY) = SUM(ST_QTY) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OK_GB FROM (SELECT AR.CTKEY , AR.OWKEY , AR.OWNAME , AR.ICKEY ,AR.ICNAME , AR.IVATKEY , SUM(TTQTY) TTQTY , SUM(AVQTY) AVQTY , AR.IBCONFIRMDATE , AR.BL_NO , AR.LOT_NO, AR.EXPIREDATE, AR.PRODUCTDATE, AR.UOM, AR.SPEC FROM WMS.VW_IVATXLCXULC_AR AR GROUP BY AR.CTKEY , AR.OWKEY , AR.OWNAME , AR.ICKEY ,AR.ICNAME , AR.IVATKEY, AR.IBCONFIRMDATE , AR.BL_NO , AR.LOT_NO, AR.EXPIREDATE, AR.PRODUCTDATE, AR.UOM, AR.SPEC ) A, (SELECT OWKEY , ICKEY , MST_KEY , SUM(ST_QTY) ST_QTY FROM SCM_IFS.VW_INTF_STOCK GROUP BY OWKEY , ICKEY , MST_KEY )C , (SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY , A.IVATKEY , (A.BASE_STOCK + A.IN_QTY - A.OUT_QTY) RESQTY, (COALESCE(B.WEIGHT, 0) / 1000) WEIGHT , COALESCE((CASE WHEN C.CFQTY = 0 AND C.NET_WGT = 0 THEN 0 WHEN C.CFQTY != 0 AND C.NET_WGT = 0 THEN 0 WHEN C.CFQTY = 0 AND C.NET_WGT != 0 THEN 0 ELSE ( C.NET_WGT / C.CFQTY) END ), 0) AV_WGT FROM TWORK_INFO_DAILY_LIST A , TADMIN_MST_IC B , TWORK_INFO_IVAT C WHERE (A.BASE_STOCK > 0 OR A.IN_QTY > 0 OR A.OUT_QTY > 0) AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY = C.IVATKEY AND A.TO_DAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'YYYYMMDD') ) E WHERE A.CTKEY = '100' AND A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = E.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = E.IVATKEY AND A.OWKEY = TRIM(C.OWKEY) AND A.ICKEY = TRIM(C.ICKEY) AND A.IVATKEY = TRIM(C.MST_KEY) GROUP BY A.OWNAME , A.OWKEY , A.ICNAME , A.ICKEY, A.IVATKEY ,A.IBCONFIRMDATE , A.BL_NO , A.LOT_NO, A.EXPIREDATE, A.PRODUCTDATE, A.UOM, A.SPEC ORDER BY A.OWNAME , A.ICKEY , A.IVATKEY ) AA WHERE AA.WMS_TTQTY = AA.NWILL_QTY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
